pi_items.metadata_value: ESA Hubble FITS Liberator - Eagle Nebula
pi_items.verified_value: ESA Hubble FITS Liberator - Eagle Nebula
pi_items.source: Confirmed via install_astroimagej.sh downloading the FITS files from esahubble.org/static/projects/fits_liberator/datasets/eagle

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real narrowband FITS images of the Eagle Nebula (M16) downloaded from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator datasets. The user must extract Mean and Mode for a dynamically generated ROI. Output is expected in /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/ionization_stats.txt. The verifier enforces a 1.0% tolerance for Mean and a 5.0% tolerance for Mode.
